name: every shipped override recipe declares overrides[].files as an array of glob patterns per §16 E-3 schema
command: for f in test-files critical-paths scripts stories generated; do node -e "const y=require('fs').readFileSync('$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/_overrides/${f}.yaml','utf8');const m=y.match(/files:\\s*\\n((?:\\s+-\\s+\"[^\"]+\"\\s*\\n?)+)/);if(!m){process.exit(2)}" || { echo "FAIL $f missing files: array" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
